title: Imperial IDE operational engine: Task Console + Taskpack Builder + full lifecycle
mission_summary: Add an operational engine so the owner can run the full task loop (idea -> taskpack -> Astronomicon -> launch card -> servitor handoff -> validation -> receipts -> bundle gate -> anti-fake-green -> owner summary -> git closure -> next task) from inside the Imperial IDE, dry-run by default.

strategic_intent.workbench: GUI panels wrap this engine later
strategic_intent.warp: lifecycle stage 8 binds to WARP session
strategic_intent.operator_goal: set and close tasks from inside the IDE, no manual ZIP
